case_title: VALPAK OF SAN FRANISCO VS TIHONOVA, LENA et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-22-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-20-2003 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALPAK OF SAN FRANISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIHONOVA, LENA $840.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $862.00, DEFT CINDERELLA HOUSE CLEANING DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE AT PLTF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $840.00 FILED BY VALPAK OF SAN FRANISCO AS TO DEFENDANT TIHONOVA, LENA CINDERELLA HOUSE CLEANING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TIHONOVA, LENA
DEFT COPY OF PLTF'S CLAIM RETURNED--LENA TIHONOVA NO LONGER LIVES AT ADDRESS--MOVED TO RUSSIA
